mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM PA_EMP_ACCOUNT pea LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE he ON pea.PERSON_ID = he.PERSON_ID AND he.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT hd ON he.DEPTNO = hd.DEPTNO

SELECT PA_EMP_ACCOUNT_NO, PERSON_ID, EMP_ID, LOCAL_NAME, DEPT_NAME, POST_GRADE_NAME, DATE_STARTED, ACCOUNT_TYPE, ACCOUNT_TYPE_NAME, ACCOUNT_ADDRESS, ACCOUNT_NO, ACCOUNT_NAME, SECURITY_NO, FUND_NO, SECURITY_PAY_DATE, FUND_PAY_DATE, TAX_NO, ACTIVITY, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY FROM ( SELECT a.*, ROWNUM AS RN FROM ( SELECT pea.PA_EMP_ACCOUNT_NO, pea.PERSON_ID, he.EMPID AS EMP_ID, he.LOCAL_NAME, hd.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(he.POST_GRADE_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_GRADE_NAME, TO_CHAR(he.DATE_STARTED, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DATE_STARTED, pea.ACCOUNT_TYPE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(pea.ACCOUNT_TYPE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS ACCOUNT_TYPE_NAME, pea.ACCOUNT_ADDRESS, pea.ACCOUNT_NO, pea.ACCOUNT_NAME, pea.SECURITY_NO, pea.FUND_NO, pea.SECURITY_PAY_DATE, pea.FUND_PAY_DATE, pea.TAX_NO, pea.ACTIVITY, TO_CHAR(pea.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREATE_DATE, get_emp_local_name(pea.CREATED_BY, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || ' ' || pea.CREATED_IP AS CREATED_BY, TO_CHAR(pea.UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS UPDATE_DATE, get_emp_local_name(pea.UPDATED_BY, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || ' ' || pea.UPDATED_IP AS UPDATED_BY FROM PA_EMP_ACCOUNT pea LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE he ON pea.PERSON_ID = he.PERSON_ID AND he.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT hd ON he.DEPTNO = hd.DEPTNO
ORDER BY pea.CREATE_DATE DESC ) a WHERE ROWNUM <= #{start, jdbcType=NUMERIC} + #{length, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ) WHERE RN > #{start, jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT pea.PA_EMP_ACCOUNT_NO, pea.PERSON_ID, he.EMPID AS EMP_ID, he.LOCAL_NAME, hd.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(he.POST_GRADE_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_GRADE_NAME, TO_CHAR(he.DATE_STARTED, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DATE_STARTED, pea.ACCOUNT_TYPE, pea.ACCOUNT_ADDRESS, pea.ACCOUNT_NO, pea.ACCOUNT_NAME, pea.SECURITY_NO, pea.FUND_NO, pea.SECURITY_PAY_DATE, pea.FUND_PAY_DATE, pea.TAX_NO, pea.ACTIVITY, TO_CHAR(pea.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREATE_DATE, get_emp_local_name(pea.CREATED_BY, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || ' ' || pea.CREATED_IP AS CREATED_BY FROM PA_EMP_ACCOUNT pea LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE he ON pea.PERSON_ID = he.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT hd ON he.DEPTNO = hd.DEPTNO WHERE pea.PA_EMP_ACCOUNT_NO = #{paEmpAccountNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PA_EMP_ACCOUNT ( PA_EMP_ACCOUNT_NO, PERSON_ID, ACCOUNT_TYPE, ACCOUNT_ADDRESS, ACCOUNT_NO, ACCOUNT_NAME, SECURITY_NO, FUND_NO, SECURITY_PAY_DATE, FUND_PAY_DATE, TAX_NO, ACTIVITY, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP ) VALUES ( PA_EMP_ACCOUNT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{accountType, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{accountAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{accountNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{accountName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{securityNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fundNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{securityPayDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fundPayDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{activity, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE PA_EMP_ACCOUNT SET ACCOUNT_TYPE = #{accountType, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, ACCOUNT_ADDRESS = #{accountAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ACCOUNT_NO = #{accountNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ACCOUNT_NAME = #{accountName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SECURITY_NO = #{securityNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FUND_NO = #{fundNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SECURITY_PAY_DATE = #{securityPayDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FUND_PAY_DATE = #{fundPayDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TAX_NO = #{taxNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ACTIVITY = #{activity, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE PA_EMP_ACCOUNT_NO = #{paEmpAccountNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM PA_EMP_ACCOUNT WHERE PA_EMP_ACCOUNT_NO = #{paEmpAccountNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
